title: Totem of Stolas Plushie
description: a totem of undying retexture with a Helluva Boss Stolas plushie and he says "OH BLITZYYY" when you use it.
body:
a totem of undying retexture with a Helluva Boss Stolas plushie and he says "OH BLITZYYY" when you use it. That's literally it

![PRAISE THE HOLY stolas plushie TOTEM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EgHtjJem/images/917731bdca0ede511b37457b7c666bf823c87b63.png)
![stolas plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15ae47338cfa3b81be8ae75dd38acb7ae4b25cd5.png)
![Stolas plushie totem in my hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/868ba722e100c067009f8fe6dfd9a28bfc475b69.png)

this is a funny little thing i made for my friend BoxBoiTV

he made out of soft pp cotton
![soft pp cotton (taken by BoxBoiTV)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e452327368c11f6ad922b57a85847ad2feecd4.png)
